title: 我打算...
prompt_en: Practice expressing plans with be going to and will.
prompt_zh: 练习用be going to和will表达计划。
description: 掌握be going to(计划)和will(决定/预测)的区别。
knowledge_points: 将来时 going to will 计划 预测
teaching_markdown:
## be going to 表示计划
- I'm going to visit my family next week. (已计划好)
- be going to = 已经决定要做的事

## will 表示当即决定
- I'll help you. (说话时才决定)
- will = 说话当下做的决定或承诺

## 对比
| be going to | will |
|------------|------|
| 事先计划 | 当场决定 |
| I'm going to travel. | I'll call you later. |

## 时间表达
- soon (很快) / someday (总有一天) / eventually (最终)
- in the future (将来) / by then (到那时)

title: 将会怎样
prompt_en: Practice making predictions with will and be going to.
prompt_zh: 练习用will和be going to做预测。
description: 掌握预测天气/未来/结果的表达。
knowledge_points: 预测 将来 天气 未来
teaching_markdown:
## will / be going to 做预测
- It will rain tomorrow. (预测天气)
- Look at those clouds! It's going to rain. (有证据的预测)

## 预测语气强弱
- definitely (肯定) > probably (大概) > perhaps (也许) > might (可能)
- It will probably be sunny. (大概会是晴天)
- It might rain later. (晚点可能会下雨)

## 天气词汇
- sunny / cloudy / rainy / stormy
- temperature (温度) / climate (气候) / forecast (预报)

title: 我能/会...
prompt_en: Practice expressing ability with can and can't.
prompt_zh: 练习用can表达能力和不能。
description: 掌握can表达能力和许可的用法。
knowledge_points: 情态 can 能力 许可 请求
teaching_markdown:
## can 表达能力
- I can swim. (我会游泳)
- Can you drive? — Yes, I can. / No, I can't.

## can 表达许可
- Can I sit here? — Sure.
- You can use my phone.

## 相关动词
- manage (设法做到) / handle (处理) / solve (解决) / fix (修理)
- reach (够到) / lift (举起)

## 常见错误
- ❌ I can to swim. → ✅ I can swim. (can后接动词原形)
- ❌ Do you can drive? → ✅ Can you drive?

title: 你可以/必须...
prompt_en: Practice giving suggestions and expressing obligation.
prompt_zh: 练习用should/must/have to提建议和表达义务。
description: 掌握should建议和must/have to必须的用法。
knowledge_points: 情态 should must have to 建议 义务
teaching_markdown:
## should 提建议
- You should rest more. (应该多休息 — 建议)
- Should I go now? — Yes, you should.

## must 表达必须/义务
- You must wear a seat belt. (必须系安全带 — 强制)
- must = 说话人认为必须

## have to 表达外部义务
- I have to go now — my bus leaves at 5.
- have to = 外部原因迫使

## 相关词汇
- advise / recommend / suggest (建议)
- rule / law / duty (规则/法律/责任)
- require / force (要求/强迫)

title: 你应该/必须
description: 掌握should/must/have to/mustn't/don't have to的区别。
knowledge_points: 情态 必须 不必 禁止 区分
teaching_markdown:
## must vs have to
- must: 主观必须 → I must study harder.
- have to: 客观必须 → I have to wake up early for work.

## mustn't vs don't have to
- mustn't = 禁止 (you must not do it)
- don't have to = 不必 (you can, but not required)

## 相关词汇
- obey (遵守) / strict (严格) / forbid (禁止) / prohibit (禁止)
- limit (限制) / exception (例外) / penalty (处罚)
- remind (提醒) / warn (警告) / risk (风险)

title: 可能/不必/禁止
prompt_zh: 练习表达可能性( may/might )和禁止( mustn't )。
description: 掌握may/might表达可能和mustn't表达禁止。
knowledge_points: 情态 may might 可能 禁止 礼貌
teaching_markdown:
## may / might 表达可能性
- It may rain. (50%可能)
- It might snow. (30%可能) — might 比 may 更不确定

## 礼貌请求 (may / could)
- May I come in? (正式礼貌)
- Could you help me? (比 Can you 更礼貌)

## don't have to 表达不必
- You don't have to come. (不必来 — 可以选择不来)
- ≠ mustn't (禁止来)

## 相关词汇
- possibly (可能) / chance (机会) / guess (猜测) / suppose (猜想)
- optional (可选的) / unnecessary (不必要的)
- permit (许可) / refuse (拒绝)
